name: local-module-repository
description: Lokales Vyra Module Repository für Offline-Entwicklung

modules.name: v2_dashboard
modules.description: This dashboard module provides an enhanced user interface for managing and monitoring various aspects of the VOS2 system. It offers real-time insights, customizable widgets, and seamless integration with other modules to enhance user experience and system administration.
modules.author: null

modules.name: v2_usermanager
modules.description: User and permission management module for VYRA
modules.author: VYRA Dev

plugins.name: Counter Widget
plugins.description: Simple counter widget for the v2_dashboard home screen. Counts up on button click; logic runs inside the v2_modulemanager as a WASM module.
plugins.author: VYRA Framework

plugins.name: Module Count
plugins.description: Reads the installed-module count from v2_modulemanager and displays it as a compact widget.
plugins.author: VYRA Framework

plugins.name: Zenoh Log Streamer
plugins.description: Streams ROS2/Zenoh topic logs to an external sink. Runs as a background WASM module.
plugins.author: VYRA Framework
